meaning: vt.射击低于,脱靶n.负脉冲信号,下冲
examples: Also EMH now agrees that markets can undershoot or overshoot.
On the other hand, in the case of high strain rate, both overshoot and undershoot do not appear.
Should an undershoot occur in a battery backed system during a power down, data can be lost immediately.
If Britain continues to undershoot its quota, there could be a milk producers' free-for-all.
Such action, if effective, would also slow the economy and might cause inflation to undershoot its target.
